title: How to Prepare for Your Pre-Wedding Photo Shoot
content: Pre-wedding shoots are a beautiful way for couples to express their love. Here are 5 quick tips to prepare: dress comfortably, choose an inspiring location, plan around golden hour lighting, practice candid interactions, and coordinate colors with your partner.
author: Luminos Editorial

title: Ultimate Guide to Event Lighting Design
content: Lighting is everything in photography. In this guide, we dive into key light, fill light, rim light setup, off-camera speedlights, and editing techniques in Lightroom to make your event portraits pop.
author: Harsha Reddy
